voice.falsifier: a second channel or any conductor character

self-name.relations: composed of the voice's four data
self-name.invariance: unique in 203,123; twin separated by cusp lattice

integration.invariance: onset exactly at SL(3); strength |u-ubar| (the pair-separation law)
integration.falsifier: SL(2) coupling or a field-independent strength

no-closure.relations: what the three bits supply from outside

three-bits.relations: chord = c XOR theta; gamma3 == c
three-bits.falsifier: a fourth independent bit or a collapse

time=basepoint.relations: ONE bit appearing as time-arrow AND basepoint AND sqrt5-branch
time=basepoint.falsifier: an instrument separating the two appearances

unmoved-axis.falsifier: an involution moving it (= the instrument)

galois-continuum.falsifier: a canonical point anywhere in it
